auth.title: Sign In
auth.subtitle: Use your configured account to access cloud sync.

settings.title: Settings
settings.locationRefreshRateSupported: Applied immediately. Real GPS rate may still be capped by device/browser (often around 1Hz).
settings.languageHelp: Used across the whole app and saved on this device.
settings.keepScreenAwakeDescription: Prevent display sleep while app is open

wakeLock.active: Active: display sleep is currently blocked.
wakeLock.enabling: Enabling wake lock... keep this tab in foreground on Android.
wakeLock.unsupported: Keep screen awake is not supported on this browser/device.
wakeLock.failed: Unable to keep screen awake. Check battery saver and browser permissions.

deleteTrack.title: Confirm Delete
deleteTrack.description: This track and its lap history will be removed.

trackList.title: Saved Tracks
trackList.emptyDescription: Record a circuit or sprint track to start racing.

recordTrack.title: Record Track
recordTrack.waitingSpeedDescription: Accelerate past 10km/h to automatically set the start line heading.

trackDetails.noDetailedHistory: No detailed history available. Record new laps to see analysis.
trackDetails.deleteLapDescription: This lap will be removed permanently from history.

raceMode.gpsPermissionHelp: Some devices need an explicit Enable GPS tap before the location permission prompt will appear.
raceMode.updateReferencePrompt: Would you like to update the reference track with this new record?

errors.unsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
errors.secureContextRequired: Safari requires HTTPS for GPS on mobile devices. Open this app via https:// or localhost.
errors.permissionDenied: Location permission denied. In Safari: Settings > Safari > Location > Allow, then reload.
errors.positionUnavailable: GPS position unavailable. Move to open sky and ensure Location Services is enabled.
errors.timeout: GPS timeout. Please keep the page active and tap Retry GPS.
errors.requestSlow: GPS request is taking too long. Keep the app in foreground and tap Retry GPS.
errors.permissionPromptNoResponse: No response from location permission prompt. Check browser site permissions and system Location setting, then retry.
